projects_research: in the nation for research influence

evidence.source_excerpt: With 74 majors, world-class teachers, and modern facilities, a wealth of knowledge is at your doorstep—or your fingertips.

evidence.claim: At UC Santa Cruz, we have resources to support your physical, mental, and emotional health, as well as safety services such as fire safety and crime prevention. UC Santa Cruz publishes an Annual Security & Fire Safety Report, based on the Jeanne Clery Disclosure of Campus Safety and Campus Crime Statistics Act (commonly referred to as the Clery Act). The report contains detailed information on the campus’s crime and fire prevention programs, as well as campus crime and fire statistics for the past three years. A paper version of the report is available upon request.
evidence.source_excerpt: At UC Santa Cruz, we have resources to support your physical, mental, and emotional health, as well as safety services such as fire safety and crime prevention. evidence.claim: One of the most extraordinary campuses in the world, UC Santa Cruz pairs high-impact research with 10 residential colleges—offering students the experience of a small liberal arts college with the depth and rigor of a major research university.
evidence.source_excerpt: One of the most extraordinary campuses in the world, UC Santa Cruz pairs high-impact research with 10 residential colleges—offering students the experience of a small liberal arts college with the depth and rigor of a major research university.

warnings: Major titles extracted from official school source (11 titles).
Phase 5 auto-enrichment completed using official-school web crawl heuristics; manual spot-checking is still recommended for edge cases.
GPA policy was normalized from absence of an explicit minimum-GPA statement on the cited official pages.
School-people enrichment uses public third-party sources (RateMyProfessors and Wikipedia/Wikimedia), so rankings are heuristic rather than official university data.
admissions.course_rigor was reset to unknown during manual cleanup because the earlier auto-extracted text was unrelated to the requested admissions field.
UC Santa Cruz testing policy was manually repaired from the official first-year student page after the auto-crawl captured Clery/safety disclosure text.

popular_professors.ranking_basis: RateMyProfessors entries sorted by rating_count desc, then average_rating desc, then would_take_again_percent desc.
popular_professors.source_summary: Matched RateMyProfessors school 'University of California Santa Cruz' (legacyId=1078) and ranked all professors with at least one rating.

successful_alumni.ranking_basis: Wikipedia list/category candidates ranked by trailing-365-day Wikipedia pageviews.
